mapper.select: select t.* from gh_jf t where #{jsrqStart} <= t.jsrq and t.jsrq <= #{jsrqEnd} and t.jsbj in ('Y', 'T', 'W', 'V', 'F', 'C') and hkpch is null
select * from schbwj t where (#{jsrqStart} <= t.jsrq and t.jsrq <= #{jsrqEnd})
select max(t.hkpch) hkpch from gh_jf t where t.jsbj in ('Y', 'T', 'W') and left(t.hkpch, 8) = #{dqrq}
mapper.insert:
insert into gh_hkxx (hkpch, xh, lx, zh, hh, je, dept_id, dz, fy, jym, thbj, scbz, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, hm, bz) values
(#{item.hkpch,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.xh,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.lx,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.zh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.hh,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.je,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.deptId,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.dz,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.jym,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.thbj,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.scbz,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.hm,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.bz,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from gh_hkxx t where t.hkpch = #{hkpch}
mapper.select:
select * from gh_qsjshkrj t where t.lx = '1' and t.rkrq in
#{item}
